content_sections.title: Bottleneck Projection Layers
content_sections.content:
Bottleneck adapters are small feedforward networks inserted after multi-head self-attention and MLP blocks. They project activations $\mathbf{h}$ to a low-dimensional bottleneck space using down-projection weights $\mathbf{W}_D \in \mathbb{R}^{d \times m}$ (where $m \ll d$), apply a non-linear activation, and project them back using up-projection weights $\mathbf{W}_U \in \mathbb{R}^{m \times d}$, adding a residual connection:

$$\mathbf{h}_{new} = \mathbf{h} + f(\mathbf{h}\mathbf{W}_D)\mathbf{W}_U$$
